template:
module Main where

import Control.Exception (try, SomeException, evaluate)
import System.IO (hSetBuffering, stdout, BufferMode(NoBuffering))

data Tree = [[SLOT tree_decl]]

sumLeafPaths :: Tree -> Int
sumLeafPaths tree = go 0 tree
  where
    [[SLOT empty_case]]
    [[SLOT leaf_case]]
    go acc (Node val left right) = [[SLOT branch_case]]

main :: IO ()
main = kataMain

slots.name: leaf_case
slots.answer: go acc (Node val Empty Empty) = acc + val
decoys: go acc (Node val Empty Empty) = acc

slots.name: branch_case
slots.answer: go (acc + val) left + go (acc + val) right
decoys: go acc left + go acc right
go val left + go val right

prompt: Pick the ADT declaration and the three pattern-match cases.
